name: CheckSmart
description_short: Columbus, OH CheckSmart location on N Wilson Rd offers check cashing and payday loan services with extended Friday hours.
description_long:
CheckSmart's Columbus, OH branch is located at 170 N Wilson Rd, offering convenient check cashing and short-term loan services. Open Monday through Thursday from 9AM to 7PM, Friday 8AM to 8PM, and Saturday 9AM to 4PM, this standalone location serves the central Columbus area.

At this Columbus location, you can cash checks, apply for payday loans, and access related financial services. Call 614-276-3334 to speak with staff about rates, requirements, and available services.

For Columbus residents needing quick access to check cashing or payday loans, bring a valid ID and proof of income. This N Wilson Rd location provides same-day services for qualified applicants.
pros: Multiple Columbus-area locations plus coverage across Ohio (Heath, Marion, Marysville, Reynoldsburg, Springfield, Whitehall)
Extended Friday hours (8:00 AM – 8:00 PM) compared to typical weekday schedule
Green Dot Visa Debit Card available in-store for unbanked customers
Gift card exchange for cash — converts idle gift cards to spendable funds
Online appointment scheduling to reduce in-store wait time
Broad transaction services under one roof: check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay
Quick lending decisions for third-party loan referrals with in-person application support
cons: CheckSmart is not the actual lender — loans come from an unnamed unaffiliated third party, obscuring rate and term transparency
Loan applications are in-store only; no fully online loan process available
Limited weekend availability: Saturday closes at 4:00 PM, Sunday at 5:00 PM
Ohio-only footprint limits accessibility for out-of-state consumers
No disclosed APR ranges or loan amounts on the website — requires an in-store visit to get details
best_for: Underbanked Ohio residents who need check cashing or money orders without a bank account
Consumers who prefer in-person financial service assistance over online applications
Columbus-area residents needing gift card liquidation or Green Dot debit card access
Short-term borrowers comfortable with third-party loan referrals and in-store processing
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best for underbanked Ohio residents who need reliable in-person access to check cashing, money orders, and everyday financial transactions. The main caveat on the lending side is that CheckSmart is a referral intermediary, not a direct lender — borrowers should expect to ask specifically about the third-party lender's rates and terms before committing, as none are disclosed online.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card (in-store purchase)
In-person customer service and financial guidance
meta_description: CheckSmart at 170 N Wilson Rd, Columbus, OH. Check cashing & payday loans with extended Friday hours.
